honestyRule: platformCeilingTier = what the vendor surfaces could support (design target, detected/designed). awardedTier = tier with runtime evidence TODAY. No runtime is awarded Tier>=2 without a passing real-runtime R1-R4 log; Tier>=4 needs a non-Bedrock ready_live proof; Tier 5 needs the (unbuilt) conformance suite. Broker caps tier by handshake evidence; manifests cannot self-promote.
